CustomField.description: Only if applicable (if the summary selected is property/measure) Affected property address details - Enter the address of the property (House name/number, street, postcode) if fraud, error or non/compliance relates to address.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Only if applicable (if the summary selected is property/measure)Affected property address details - Enter the address of the property (House name/number, street, postcode) if fraud, error or non/compliance relates to address.
CustomField.label: Property Address
